description: SG6311A Harmonics and Sub-Harmonics — all spec DUTs, July 2026

secondary_plots.title: Harmonics — Summary Statistics All Temperatures
secondary_plots.comment: Type=90 SummaryPlot, no Test Step filter. Shows mean + min/max band + TTL estimate vs frequency per group.

secondary_plots.title: Harmonics — All Temperatures (Env Coverage)
secondary_plots.comment: Type=80 scatter, no Test Step filter — ordered by temperature. Port (RF1/RF2) and Serial Number groups visible.

secondary_plots.title: Harmonics and Sub-Harmonics — Room (all serials)
secondary_plots.comment: Type=80 scatter, Room only. Groups: AlcState, HarmonicNumber, Mode, Serial Number.

secondary_plots.title: Harmonics — Statistical Summary (Room)
secondary_plots.comment: P90/C90 tolerance interval per frequency. Room data only.

secondary_plots.title: Harmonics — Distribution (Room, all serials)
secondary_plots.comment: Histogram + KDE of all dBc values across serials, frequencies, and harmonic numbers.

secondary_plots.title: Harmonics — By Test Station (Room)
secondary_plots.comment: Type=80 scatter, one trace per test station. Station-to-station consistency check.

secondary_plots.title: 2nd Harmonic — Select Frequencies (Room)
secondary_plots.comment: Type=80 scatter at select frequencies. Groups: AlcState, HarmonicNumber, Mode, Serial Number. Spec: -55 dBc (>50 MHz).

secondary_plots.title: 2nd Harmonic — Statistical Summary at Select Frequencies (Room)
0.5x Sub-Harmonic — Select Frequencies (Room)
secondary_plots.comment: Type=80 scatter at select frequencies — 0.5x sub-harmonic (fc/2). Spec: -60 dBc.

secondary_plots.title: 1.5x Sub-Harmonic — Select Frequencies (Room)
secondary_plots.comment: Type=80 scatter at select frequencies — 1.5x sub-harmonic (1.5 x fc). Spec: -60 dBc.

secondary_plots.title: 1.5x Sub-Harmonic — Select Frequencies v2 (Room)
secondary_plots.comment: Type=80 scatter at select frequencies — analytic 13 variant of 1.5x sub-harmonic. Spec: -60 dBc.

_notes: Analytic 14 (Harmonics_Env_Dataset): no Test Step filter, Port (RF1/RF2) grouping — env coverage view.
Analytics 1, 9-13: Type=80 Scatter — produce CSVs, all plotted above.
Analytics 2-4: Type=20 BoxPlot — no CSV loader, no secondary plots.
Analytics 5-8: Type=90 SummaryPlot — pre-aggregated stats (Min/Max/Mean/TTL per freq bin), not compatible with scatter plot types. Need a dedicated summary_plot type.
